name: Synup Social vs. SocialFlow
hero_summary: Ready to really get into a flow state? Switch to the #1 SocialFlow alternative: Synup Social. With intuitive workflows that make SocialFlow look like child’s play, Synup will revolutionize the way you work with your team and clients! If you’re looking to switch, look no further.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Make it easy to execute your strategy. With Synup Social, you can power your social media strategy with revolutionary analytics. We’ll guide your posting strategy, and help your team at every step. Get the ease of scheduling you love while creating better, more impactful content. Here’s how we do it:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: SocialFlow doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation OR strategy. Synup Social helps you grow. Enjoy expert analytics that help you build your ideal content strategy. From the best time to post to post-by-post analytics, you’ll have the insights you need to smash your goals.
section_2_slider_2_summary: From intuitive approval workflows to advanced collaboration, join forces with your team or your customers to create a content calendar that everyone can get behind. While SocialFlow lacks content creation assistance, Synup Social’s AI-powered post generator inspires you to create posts that your whole team can get behind. Goodbye, writers’ block!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Change your workflow for the better
section_2_step_3_summary: Post scheduling is just the beginning! Make your life a lot easier with Synup Social in your tool belt. Remove friction from social media management every step of the way and collaborate with your team and your clients. It all starts with a revolutionary approval workflow where you and your team can create drafts, edit each other's work, and get feedback and approval from your supervisors. If you loved SocialFlow’s workflows, get ready to be amazed.
section_2_slider_4_summary: It's expansion season. Synup Social grows with your business, whether you’re an agency adding clients or you’re catering to local audiences with location-specific accounts. SocialFlow lacks support for multi-account management, impeding your growth. Synup Social makes it simple for brands with multiple locations to manage their social profiles for tens to thousands of locations - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over SocialFlow?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Saving time and money on a better product? Sign us up! Synup Social inspires your team, empowers you to build better workflows, and delivers results with revolutionary analytics. No matter your goal, Synup Social is the perfect choice for agencies and brands alike! After all, With advanced insights that guide you from post creation to analytics, Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed. Let’s see how it stacks up against SocialFlow:
